message:
chore(legacy_sqlalchemy): update submodule to include Python linting fixes

Bump legacy_sqlalchemy submodule from 80ced34 to 9883c82 which applies
automated PEP 8 linting corrections across 33 files:

- E711: Replace `== None`/`!= None` with `is None`/`is not None`
- E712: Replace `== True`/`== False` with truthy/falsy expressions
- Remove unused imports from events.py and util/typing.py

These changes affect library source (events, associationproxy,
relationships, schema), examples, and test suites across all dialects
(PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, Oracle) and ORM/SQL test modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
